title: ICAI CA September & November 2026 Exams: Registration Now Open!
content:
# ICAI CA September & November 2026 Exams: Registration Now Open!

Ek important update hai. The Institute of Chartered Accountants of India (ICAI) ne CA September aur November 2026 examinations ke liye registration process shuru kar diya hai. Candidates jo inn exams mein appear hona chahte hain, woh ab apne forms fill kar sakte hain.

*   **Online Application Portal:** eservices.icai.org
*   **Application Window Opens:** July 6, 2026
*   **Last Date to Apply (without late fee):** July 19, 2026
*   **Last Date to Apply (with late fee of Rs 600):** July 22, 2026
*   **Application Correction Window:** July 23 to July 25, 2026

As per the Important Announcement dated May 2, 2026, the examination schedule is as follows:
*   **CA Foundation Exams:** September 2, 5, 7, and 9, 2026
*   **CA Intermediate Exams:**
    *   Group 1: September 1, 3, and 6, 2026
    *   Group 2: September 8, 10, and 12, 2026
*   **CA Final Exams:**
    *   Group 1: November 2, 4, and 6, 2026
    *   Group 2: November 9, 11, and 13, 2026

Candidates are advised to complete their applications well within the deadlines to avoid any last-minute issues.

## Read the Official Document
*   [Download the Official Notification/Circular here](https://www.icai.org/post/important-announcement-ca-exams-september-november-2026)

*Published on: 13 July 2026*
